title: [Nyessem, Baths]
description: Thick steam and the smell of scented oils are both pervasive here.  Across most of the room, an oval-shaped pool lined with multihued gemstones is filled with cool, clear water that shimmers with an ethereal quality and is fed by a small stone fountain.  Hung against the far wall, a row of linen hammocks offers a place for repose.  Similarly, an ornate cane-backed settee is available in a far corner, next to some stone benches and a large bronze brazier emitting wisps of steam.
